name: advertisement-skills
description: 广告技能市场包：用于广告创意简报、媒介规划、创意审核、Seedance 短剧分镜、素材优化和投放复盘工作流。Advertisement skills market package for ad briefs, media planning, creative review, Seedance short drama storyboards, asset optimization, and campaign retrospectives.

interface.description: 可复用的 Codex 广告工作流技能，覆盖广告创意简报、媒介规划、创意审核、Seedance 短剧分镜和投放复盘。Reusable advertisement workflow skills for ad briefs, media planning, creative review, Seedance short drama storyboards, and campaign retrospectives.
